properties.description: UI screenshot of the Document Scanner (ماسح المستندات) view in the Sanad legal app. Shows a camera capture area (currently inactive/black), two action buttons (Activate Camera and Upload from Device), a pages panel showing no pages captured yet, a right-side RTL navigation sidebar, and a yellow tip banner about best scanning practices.
properties.layout: RTL two-panel: main content left, nav sidebar right

properties.description: Feature allowing users to photograph legal documents with camera, extract text via OCR, and export as image or Word file.
Browser camera API integration for capturing document photos directly within the PWA. Camera area shown as inactive black rectangle until activated.
properties.ui_state: inactive until user clicks Activate Camera

properties.description: Alternative to camera capture: user can upload an existing image from device storage for OCR processing.

Right-side RTL navigation sidebar visible across all views. Contains links to: Today, Dashboard, Clients, Cases Board, Documents, Document Scanner (active), Invoices, Compliance (badge:4), Tasks (badge:9), Deep Work, Calendar. Also shows PWA install hint and ⌘K quick search shortcut.
Progressive Web App capability shown in sidebar footer and status bar. App can be installed to desktop. Status bar shows 'Optimized for home server · PWA enabled'.
properties.install_hint: متثبت كتطبيق PWA. ثبته على سطح المكتب للوصول اليومي.

properties.description: Full Arabic right-to-left interface targeting Saudi lawyers and small legal firms. All text in Arabic, navigation on right side, content flows RTL. Language toggle (EN) available in top bar.
properties.target_users: Lawyers and small legal firms (محامين والمنشآت الصغيرة في السعودية)

properties.description: Lower panel in Scanner view displaying captured document pages. Shows empty state 'لا توجد صفحات بعد. التقط أول صفحة.' (No pages yet. Capture the first page.) with camera placeholder icon.
properties.empty_state_text: لا توجد صفحات بعد. التقط أول صفحة.

properties.description: Amber/yellow informational banner at the top of the scanner main area with best-practice tips for document scanning: good lighting, flat document, fill the frame.
properties.text: لأفضل نتائج: صوّر في إضاءة جيدة، اجعل المستند مسطحاً، وامأل الإطار
